title: 1.21.6 Old Ghast and Happy Ghast
description: Makes the ghast and happy ghast have the previous textures.
body:
# **What does this pack do?**

This pack makes the happy ghast and normal ghast have the texture before 1.21.6

![Happy ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a3b303aa43b927415e23b2051a0bdcc52077095.png)

![Ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/365ed8b7a95d05532138275ac5825eb7fa740767.png)


# **Installation Guide:**

**Windows:**
1. Go to your files to %appdata% and then go to the /.minecraft/ folder.
2. Go to /.minecraft/resourcepacks.
3. Put the resourcepack in the folder.

**Linux:**

1. Go to your files to your /.minecraft/ folder.
2. Then go to /resourcepacks/.
3. Put the resourcepack in the same folder.

**MacOS**

1. Go to ~/.minecraft/resourcepacks/ in your file manager.
2. Put the pack inside that folder.


# 

Thanks for downloading!
